feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: You cannot edit this employee time anymore because it contais references to a closed time account.
entry.content:
Hello guys,

I cannot edit a employee time, because apparently my time account is closed. In fact, its not closed. 

The Employee time its editable set to Yes. Time account closed set to NO. 

Have you ever encounter this error message?  Would you help me with this?

Thank you.

SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central integration to SAP Business Suite

entry.title: SuccessFactors Custom Portlet Notifications via CPI to Microsoft Teams
entry.content:
Detailed Problem Description / Question

I’m looking for guidance (or an SAP KBA reference) around sending notifications from SAP SuccessFactors to Microsoft Teams via SAP CPI, specifically when the source is a custom portlet.

In our scenario, we have a custom portlet in SuccessFactors that displays an alert or status message on the SuccessFactors home page. Unlike standard SuccessFactors Teams notifications, this custom portlet does not automatically trigger a Teams notification.

The requirement is as follows:

  • A notification or alert occurs in a custom SuccessFactors portlet

  • This event should be picked up by SAP CPI

  • CPI should then send a notification to a Microsoft Teams channel (webhook)

At this stage, we understand that:

  • SuccessFactors does not natively generate MS Teams notifications for custom portlets

  • Any notification would likely require custom integration logic (e.g. OData, Integration Center extract, or custom API trigger)

  • CPI would be responsible for transforming the message and forwarding it to Microsoft Teams

My questions are:

  1. Is there an official SAP KBA or documentation that confirms custom portlets do not support native notifications?

  2. Are there recommended or supported approaches for enabling CPI to detect an event or change from a custom portlet?

  3. Has anyone successfully implemented a CPI → Microsoft Teams notification for a custom SuccessFactors object or portlet, and if so, what approach was used?

Best Regards

Adele Beets

entry.title: ERP To EC - IT0041 DATES
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I want replicate a specific type of data of infotype 0041 from Erp to Ec, exactly in a custom field of employment detail portlet. 

i have setting field as date type, but replication report finish with error. Field expecting is datetime. Can you help me? I want write first hire date  after judgment

entry.title: How Employee Absence date recalculation will work in Successfactors time off
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

Could you please help us to check is it possible to do the Employee Absence date recalculation.

For Example:

Employee 'A' is having 10 days as annual Entitlement for the year 2024 and the bookable period is 01-01-2024 to 31-12-2025.

and 10 days as annual Entitlement for the year 2024 and the bookable period is 01-01-2025 to 31-12-2026.

Employee booked booked all 10 days leave in 2024 year bucket and he booked some days around 6 days in 2025 also. he is having 4 days in 2026 leave bucket.

After that he cancelled 2 days leave in 2024 bucket which is booked for the dates in 2025. So the leave bucket has 2 days for 2024.

After that employee not booked any leaves. So Is it possible to do Absence date recalculation/reallocation to use the leaves which is already deducted from 2025 bucket to 2024 bucket.

Please Let me know. Thanks

Thanks
Murugan Perumal

entry.title: How to reuse employee id after cancelling the ONB with rehire functionality enabled
entry.content:
Hi ONB Experts,

Need your help urgently. We have 20 candidate cases, wherein we are not able to complete the onboarding process on account of below error due to incorrect event reason flowing from RCM. 

While attempting to complete the Review New Hire Data step, the system is generating the following error:

"You cannot create a job information record without the recruit record for user XXX. The first job information record must be the recruit record."

Following the KBA solution (https://me.sap.com/notes/3356218/E), we tried changing the event reason (where the event is “Hire”), but then encountered this error:

"You're not allowed to change the event reason if the event is also changed from Rehire to Hire. Ensure that changing the event reason for this record does not change the event or employment status."

This results in a loop where we cannot change the event reason, but without changing it, we cannot proceed further.

Steps to reproduce the issue (including all user accounts involved):

  1. Login as Onboarding SPOC
  2. Navigate to the Onboarding Dashboard
  3. Search for the candidate
  4. Start the Review New Hire Data step
  5. Complete the required information
  6. Click Submit

At this point, the error below appears:

"jobInfo: You cannot create a job information record without the hire record for user [USERID]. The first job information record must be the hire record."

Root Cause Analysis:

    • The error is due to the event reason flowing incorrectly from RCM, i.e., "Replacement - Resignation (Rehire_Rep-Term-Resig)", which has the event as Rehire.
    • We attempted to change the event reason to "Replacement - Resignation (Hire_Rep_Term_Resig)", which is what was selected in RCM.
    • However, upon clicking Submit, the system returns:

"You're not allowed to change the event reason if the event is also changed from Rehire to Hire. Ensure that changing the event reason for this record does not change the event or employment status."

Thus, this blocks further progress.

Recent system changes prior to issue onset:

      • Created a custom picklist field cust_EventReason in the candidate application template.
      • Created a new picklist “EventReason” and mapped it to cust_EventReason.
      • Mapped the cust_EventReason in Recruit-to-Hire data mapping to ensure the event reason flows correctly from RCM to ONB, as per updated SAP 2H release guidelines.

Please advise on how to resolve this event reason flow conflict or workaround to proceed past this step without wasting employee id's.

Thank you

@Gopinath_Murugaiyan

entry.title: Alumni: mass load to convert former employees as Alumni
entry.content:
Hi community,

Could you please vote for this improvement request!

#Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence

Request ID: 344788, Category: Offboarding

Cretated by @Arjen Van Hooydonk.

This would be really hepfull as currently the solution works only for new terminated employees!

Thanks 

Sevda

entry.title: Requirment Traciability Matrix
entry.content:
Hello All

Do we have any SAP SuccessFactors Product (module) description of Requirment Traciability Matrix like to have like checklist for Discovery Phase before AS-IS and To-BE for any modules escpecially EC and ECP

REg

Kumar

entry.title: SuccessFactors Employee central exam- New format
entry.content:
Hello All,

I was looking for information regarding the new exam format for SuccessFactors Employee Central. 

Are there any sample questions available which I can refer to for preparing for the exam? Any other pointers to prepare for the exam would also be helpful.

Thank you in advance!

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: Question: Bulk onboarding for acquired team members (Onboarding 2.0 + EC)
entry.content:
Hi all — as we prepare for future acquisitions, I’m looking for a more scalable way to handle onboarding paperwork for acquired team members.

Current state:

  • We’re doing mass imports into Employee Central (EC) with acquired team member data.
  • Onboarding paperwork is still paper-based, which is creating a significant burden for our business partners.

Goal:
Leverage technology so that onboarding paperwork is triggered automatically (instead of relying on manual/paper processes).

Question:
Is there a way to mass import acquired team members directly into Onboarding 2.0 (or bulk-trigger the onboarding workflow/documents) after they’re loaded into EC?

I’ve found the “Add New Hire to Onboarding” option for acquired team members, but it appears to be one person at a time, which won’t scale for acquisitions.

If anyone has guidance, documentation, or a recommended approach (e.g., an integration, template/import method, or best practice), I’d really appreciate it. Thank you!

entry.title: ECP Integration
entry.content:
Hello All

According to SAP Best Practice and recommendations, kindly provide the latest Interface tools for below?

 

 

 

EC -  ECP - HR Master data - Recommended Interface?
ECP - S/4HANA Cloud - Payroll posting to Finance - Recommended Interface?
S4 HANA Cloud - EC  -Cost Center - Recommended Interface?

 

 

Reg

Kumar

entry.title: how to stop a integration center job from triggering business rules in job information when it is ru
entry.content: we have configured a integration center job to update job information in successfators. however the job is triggering business rules and we dont want that to happen. is there a way to stop business rules from being executed

entry.title: Can Intelligent Services Events Be Extended or Repurposed in SuccessFactors?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

SAP SuccessFactors currently exposes 41 Intelligent Services events across the suite (full list available here: Intelligent Services Events). These events work well, but they cover only a small portion of the functional footprint of the overall SuccessFactors platform.

I’m looking to understand what options exist when the standard events are not sufficient:

  • Is it possible to create custom Intelligent Services events?
  • Alternatively, can an existing event be repurposed or extended to trigger custom logic?
  • Are there any recommended patterns or best practices for covering business scenarios that are not supported by the standard 41 events?

Thanks in advance for your insights!

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Event-driven architecture

entry.title: Default National ID in Add New Employee wizard
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

we would like to default the national ID field in Spain, or alternatively have message pop up to ask for the ID when the employee is hired in Spain and the field was left empty.

I found the following KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/0002456957 which details how to do that - but unfortunately, for me it does not seem to work. First, when creating a rule using the described scenario (Trigger onInit Rules for Hire/Rehire) it will create a rule with the "Employee Information Model" as basis instead of "Employee Information" as described in the KBA, and there seems to be no way to change it. 

Therefore I can not recreate the rules as described in the article. Any other tries (even without trying to restrict the default to Spain), were not successful. Did anyone find a solution for this?

Thank you all in advance and best regards

Julia

entry.title: Employee Central Dependent Workflow optimisation
entry.content:
An employee X submits a addition of a dependent and a workflow is triggered.

The agent verifying the details find out that the attachment is not a relevant one and returns the request to employee to withdraw and submit a new request.

Employee gets a notification with details, and he finds two options on workflow resubmit and withdraw.

Actual observation : The resubmit, submits the request but does not allow any changes to previous data including change of attachment.

Question 1: On dependent can the resubmit provide an option to correct the attachment and resubmit the request with corrected information, if yes please provide the setup details.

Question2 :  is there a possibility to disable the resubmit button on dependent workflow and employee has only option to withdraw and he initiates a new request again with correct information.

entry.title: Is it possible to dynamically update FTE/Contingent workers count in Company Org Chart?
entry.content: Is it possible to show only the count of FTE in company Org Chart  if I updated the setting to exclude contingent workers?

entry.title: Thrive XM Index - SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Dear SAP SuccessFactors Experts,

Is anyone using Thrive XM Index in any of your clients? I activated it from the Upgrade Center , and the tile was not visible in Manage Home Page -> Quick Actions.

Upon referring to the below KBA 
https://me.sap.com/notes/3571747/E

The KBA says the Tile was deprecated due to Low Usage. But the upgrade is still visible in Recommended Upgrades section in the Upgrade Center.

Its better to also be removed from the Upgrade center if its deprecated , so confusions can be avoided considering it appearing under Recommended Upgrades.

entry.title: ConvertExternalUserOnStartDateJob behavior
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Can I confirm that the ConvertExternalUserOnStartDateJob when up and running will convert external users to internal employees regardless of the start date?

If job, however, is not enabled, external candidate after Manage Pending hires will only be internal employees "automatically" upon start date?

Thank you very much!

 

Best Regards,

Gelo

entry.title: OData v2 upsert on custom MDF Object creates record but does NOT trigger workflow
entry.content:
Hi everyone

I'm trying to create a new record in a custom MDF object (cust_mymdf) via the OData v2 API using a POST to the /upsert endpoint, with the goal of triggering the configured approval workflow.

What I'm trying to achieve:

  • Use the OData API to insert a termination request record as pending data.
  • Have the system's standard MDF workflow (configured on the object with a workflow group for approval) automatically trigger upon creation via API, so an approver receives a notification and can review/approve/reject.

Setup details:

  • Custom MDF object: cust_mymdf (effective-dated, externalCode as key field).
  • Pending Data = Yes on the object definition.
  • Workflow is configured directly on the object (have also tried business rule on save).
  • API user:   (non-admin/technical user, no "Admin access to MDF OData API" permission granted in RBP).
  • Authentication: Basic Auth (username (myuser@companyid) + password).

API call (via Postman):

  • Method: POST
  • URL:https://api55preview.sapsf.eu/odata/v2/upsert?workflowConfirmed=true

Result:

  • HTTP 200 OK
  • Response body:
{
  "d": [
    {
      "key": "cust_mymdf/effectiveStartDate=2026-02-19T00:00:00.000Z,cust_mymdf/externalCode=19",
      "status": "OK",
      "editStatus": "UPSERTED",
      "message": null,
      "index": 0,
      "httpCode": 200,
      "inlineResults": null
    }
  ]
}​
  • The record appears in Manage Data
  • No workflow is triggered — no approval request is created, no notification sent, nothing appears in Manage Workflow Requests or the approver's inbox.

    What I've already checked / tried:

    • The parameter ?workflowConfirmed=true is included in the URL (as required per sap documentation to simulate UI confirmation).
    • The API user does not have the "Admin access to MDF OData API" permission.
    • Manual creation via UI (Manage Data → Create new record for cust_MassTerminate) does trigger the workflow correctly (approver sees it).
    • Effective date is future-dated (2026-02-19), but same behavior occurs if I test with current date.
    • Workflow is set to trigger on create.
    • No duplicate pending records on the same key.

      According to SAP KBA 2396714 ("Workflow not Triggered via API or Integration Center") and community blogs (e.g., "Triggering workflows for MDF using OData API"), the combination of:

      • workflowConfirmed=trueand
      • API user without "Admin access to MDF OData API" permission

      Is there any additional paramters that I'm missing? Any help or pointers would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Contingent Worker Converted to Employee – Email Addresses
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have an employee who was previously a contingent worker and has since been hired into our company.


He has one employee file with two employments (his contingent employment, which is inactive, and his current employment, which is active).

On both employments, he has the same email address. This is causing an issue with the user integration between our HRIS (SAP SuccessFactors) and our 360Learning platform. Since the unique key used to create a user in 360Learning is the email address, having the same email address on both employments is creating a conflict. As a result, the user cannot be created in 360Learning.

We have tried to modify the email address on one employment, but the change is automatically reflected on the other employment as well.

Are there any clients who have encountered this situation? What solutions have you implemented?

Thank you

entry.title: New Certification Format for SAP SuccessFactors Time Management
entry.content:
Hi There. I am currently learning the SAP SuccessFactors Time Management course from Learning Hub. When I checked the certification for this module, it says "New Format". Is this the new scenario based exam for certification? Please share some details on what to expect in the new format assessment. This is the first time I will be appearing for the new format assessment.

Also, how do I ensure coverage of all topics that relate to the new format assessment? Does the Learning Journey covers all aspects of the new format assessment? If not, what additional practice should I do in order to be successful?

Also please let me know whether the certification assessment for SAP SuccessFactors Time Management is scenario based or task based? Does it mention in the certification details page whether the assessment is scenario based or task based?
